subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Remembrance calleth out betwixt earth and heaven: By God! The Remembered One hath come with a Cause before which none can stand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الذکر ینادی بین الارض و السماء تالله قد اتی المذکور بامر لایقوم معه من
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @power of the Manifestation of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @chastisement and requital
